name: Toray Textiles (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Toray Textiles (Thailand) Public Company Limited, a textile company, manufactures and markets various fabric products in Thailand. It provides T/R fabrics, spun T/C fabrics, filament fabrics, denim yarns, knitted fabrics, cords, airbag fabrics, and other yarns. The company also distributes its products in the United States, Canada, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and Asia. Toray Textiles (Thailand) Public Company Limited is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Toray Textiles (Thailand) Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Toray Industries, Inc.
